Welcome

Rocky Mountain Excavating

Rocky Mountain Excavating has been serving Albuquerque and the surrounding region with premium excavation contractor services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Albuquerque Trusts Rocky Mountain Excavating

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
Work With Us →

“
Rocky Mountain Excavating did an outstanding job with our foundation excavation. They were on time, professional, and very careful to avoid damaging our existing landscaping. The team clearly communicated the entire process, and the final result was perfect. Highly recommend!
